about.title: About SAMÍ
about.body: SAMÍ is a womenswear brand from Baku. We design pieces built around restraint — clean lines, considered fabrics, silhouettes that last. Each collection is built around how modern women actually dress: with intention, without effort.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.worldwideBody: We ship to most countries worldwide. All orders include complimentary shipping.
shipping.deliveryBody1: Standard delivery usually takes 7–14 business days depending on your location. Express delivery (3–5 business days) is available in selected regions.
shipping.deliveryBody2: Please note that delivery times are estimates. International orders may be subject to customs processing, which can add additional time beyond our control.
shipping.orderTrackingBody: Once your order has shipped, you will receive an email with tracking information. You can also check your order status on our
shipping.returnsBody: All sales are final. If you receive a damaged, defective, or incorrect item, please see our

returns.title: Returns Policy
returns.allSalesBody: As a newly launched brand, we do not currently offer standard returns or exchanges. All purchases are considered final. We encourage you to review our size guide and product descriptions carefully before placing your order.
returns.damagedBody: If you receive an item that is damaged, defective, or different from what you ordered, we are happy to help. Please contact us within 48 hours of delivery so we can review the issue promptly.
returns.damagedInclude: To help us process your request, please include the following in your message:
returns.includePhotos: Clear photographs of the item and any damage
returns.damagedResolution: Our team will review your case and get back to you as quickly as possible with a resolution, which may include a replacement or store credit at our discretion.
returns.howToReachBody: For any questions about your order, email us at
returns.responseTime: We aim to respond within one business day.
returns.policyUpdatesBody: As SAMÍ grows, we plan to expand our returns options. This page will always reflect the most up-to-date version of our policy.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: SAMÍ ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.accountInfoDesc: name, email address, and password when you create an account.
privacy.orderInfoDesc: shipping address, phone number, and payment details when you place an order.
privacy.usageDataDesc: pages visited, browser type, and device information collected automatically to improve our website.
privacy.use1: To process and deliver your orders.
privacy.use2: To communicate with you about your orders and account.
privacy.use3: To improve our website and services.
privacy.use4: To send order confirmations and shipping updates via email.
privacy.dataSharingBody: We do not sell your personal data. We share information only with trusted service providers that help us operate (payment processors, shipping carriers, email services), and only to the extent necessary to fulfil your order.
privacy.legalBasisIntro: We process your personal data on the following grounds:
privacy.contractDesc: to fulfil orders you place with us (shipping address, payment details, etc.).
privacy.consentDesc: when you create an account or contact us voluntarily.
privacy.legitimateInterestDesc: to improve our website, prevent fraud, and ensure security.
privacy.withdrawConsent: You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us or deleting your account. Withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out before the withdrawal.
privacy.cookiesBody1: Our website uses cookies and similar technologies to keep you signed in, remember your preferences (such as currency), and understand how visitors use our site. These are essential for the website to function correctly.
privacy.cookiesBody2: We do not use third-party advertising or tracking cookies. You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings at any time, although doing so may affect your experience on our site.
privacy.dataRetentionIntro: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. Specifically:
privacy.accountRetentionDesc: kept for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion at any time.
privacy.orderRetentionDesc: retained for up to 5 years to comply with tax and accounting regulations.
privacy.usageRetentionDesc: retained in anonymised or aggregated form and periodically purged.
privacy.dataSecurityBody: We use industry-standard measures to protect your data, including encrypted connections (HTTPS), secure password storage, and restricted access to personal information.
privacy.yourRightsBody: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us. If you have an account, you can update your information directly from your account page.
privacy.contactBody: If you have any questions about this policy, please email us at

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By placing an order on the SAMÍ website you agree to the following terms. Please read them carefully before purchasing.
terms.ordersPricingBody: All prices are displayed in the selected currency and are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to cancel orders due to pricing errors, stock issues, or suspected fraud. You will be notified if your order is affected.
terms.orderAcceptance: An order is not considered accepted until it has been confirmed by us. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order at our discretion.
terms.paymentBody: We accept bank transfers and, where available, card payments through our payment provider. Orders will only be processed and shipped after full payment has been successfully received and confirmed.
terms.salesReturnsBody: All sales are final. We do not currently offer standard returns or exchanges. If you receive a damaged, defective, or incorrect item, please refer to our
terms.salesReturnsEnd: for details on how to contact us.
terms.shippingBody: Delivery times are estimates and may vary depending on your location and customs processing. SAMÍ is not responsible for delays caused by third-party carriers or customs authorities. For full details, see our
terms.accuracyBody: You are responsible for providing accurate and complete information when placing an order. We are not responsible for issues arising from incorrect details provided by the customer.
terms.ipBody: All content on this website — including images, text, logos, and designs — is the property of SAMÍ and may not be reproduced without written permission.
terms.liabilityBody: SAMÍ is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our website or products, to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon publication on this page. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contactBody: Questions about these terms? Email us at

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: We would love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about an order, need help with sizing, or just want to say hello — our team is here to help.
contact.responseTime: We aim to respond within one business day.
contact.whatsappBody: You can also reach us on WhatsApp for quick questions about orders or products.
contact.instagramSuffix: for new arrivals, styling inspiration, and updates.
contact.businessBody: For wholesale, press, or collaboration requests, please email us with the subject line "Business Inquiry" and we will get back to you.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for may have been moved or no longer exists.

whatsapp.prefilledMessage: Hi SAMÍ, I have a question about an order.
